---
title: " General Social Survey (GSS) 2024 Subset"
format: html
---

Dataset Name: [GSS2024]{.data}

This dataset is a subset of the 2024 General Social Survey (GSS) data, obtained 
from NORC at the University of Chicago. After removing observations with missing 
values, the dataset contains $n = 399$ individuals.

The variables included in this dataset are described below.

[Age]{.var}: Age of the respondent (in years). 

[Sex]{.var}: Sex of the respondent

  - Male  
  - Female  

[Degree]{.var}:   Highest degree earned by the respondent.

  - No HS (Less than high school) 
  - HS (High school)  
  - JC (Junior college) 
  - Bachelor (Bachelor’s degree) 
  - Graduate (Graduate degree) 

[Race]{.var}: Race of the respondent

  - White  
  - Black  
  - Other  

[Grass]{.var}: Respondent’s opinion on whether marijuana should be made legal 

  - Yes (supports legalization)  
  - No (does not support legalization)

[Life]{.var}: Respondent’s general satisfaction with life

  - Very satisfied  
  - Pretty satisfied  
  - Not too satisfied 

[Tax]{.var}: Respondent’s opinion on whether taxes are too high

  - High (Too high) 
  - OK (About right) 
  - Low (Too low) 

[Mode]{.var}: Mode of data collection

  - In-person  
  - Phone  
  - Web  

**Source**

Smith, T. W., Davern, M., Freese, J., & Morgan, S. L. *General Social Survey, 1972–2024*. NORC at the University of Chicago. <https://gss.norc.org>
